name: Zoho Analytics MCP
description: Turn natural language into data insights. Analyze BI data, visualize trends, and answer complex business questions using Zoho Analytics
long_description: The Zoho Analytics MCP Server (Beta) implements the Model Context Protocol (MCP), a standardized interface that enables AI models to interact seamlessly with applications. This middleware solution bridges the connection between AI agents and Zoho Analytics, providing powerful data analysis capabilities through a unified interface.

ANALYTICS_CLIENT_ID.title: Client ID
ANALYTICS_CLIENT_ID.description:
Client ID of the self-client that was registered in Zoho API Console.
The API Console can be accessed at https://api-console.zoho.com/.
Please use the scope 'ZohoAnalytics.fullaccess.all'

ANALYTICS_CLIENT_SECRET.title: Client Secret
ANALYTICS_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Client secret of the self-client that was registered in the Zoho API Console

ANALYTICS_REFRESH_TOKEN.title: Refresh Token
ANALYTICS_REFRESH_TOKEN.description: Refresh Token generated for the self-client

ACCOUNTS_SERVER_URL.title: Zoho Accounts Server URL
ACCOUNTS_SERVER_URL.description: The URL of the Zoho Accounts server. Example: accounts.zoho.com. Kindly, refer https://www.zoho.com/analytics/api/v2/api-specification.html

ANALYTICS_SERVER_URL.title: Zoho Analytics Server URL
ANALYTICS_SERVER_URL.description: The URL of the Zoho Analytics Server. Example: analyticsapi.zoho.com. Kindly, refer https://www.zoho.com/analytics/api/v2/api-specification.html

ALLOWED_FILE_ROOT.title: Allowed File Root Directory
ALLOWED_FILE_ROOT.description: The absolute path to the directory that the MCP server is allowed to access when handling file operations (import/export). This is a security measure to prevent unauthorized file system access. The server will only be able to read/write files within this directory and its subdirectories.

QUERY_DATA_RESULT_ROW_LIMITS.title: Query Data Result Row Limits
QUERY_DATA_RESULT_ROW_LIMITS.description: The maximum number of rows that can be returned in the result when querying data from Zoho Analytics. This limit helps to prevent excessive API units consumption and ensures the agent context is not overloaded
